Margins are controllable; product validation via competitor traffic is key.
Margins are one of the few fully controllable aspects of a business, unlike Facebook CPA or account shutdowns. Product research involves finding a product solving a real problem in a passionate market with good margins, but product validation via competitor traffic analysis is more important. A free method uses highly cookied websites like weather.com or Fox News with native ads from Taboola and Outbrain; clicking ads trains cookies to show more offers. Using SimilarWeb to gauge traffic, rapid scaling from zero to ~100k monthly visitors is a green flag, with a target of 200-300k visitors per month.
